description: Structured question database for DetectHiddenFees content planning. Every question maps to an entity, intent, and priority.

questions.question: Can AI help me make better financial decisions?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't know if AI financial tools are trustworthy or useful
questions.notes: Strengthen quick-answer section. Add specific examples of savings from AI advisor tools.

questions.question: What can an AI financial assistant actually do for me?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't understand the practical capabilities of AI financial tools
questions.notes: Add concrete use cases with step-by-step walkthroughs.

questions.question: How does AI detect hidden fees in my documents?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't understand the technology behind AI fee detection
questions.notes: Top AEO opportunity. Explain OCR, ML pattern matching, market comparison in plain language.

questions.question: How much can I save by using AI to negotiate my bills?
questions.userProblem: Consumers want to know the ROI of using AI bill negotiation before trying it
questions.notes: Create interactive savings calculator with realistic industry data.

questions.question: Is AI contract review as good as hiring a lawyer?
questions.userProblem: Consumers want to know if they can skip lawyer fees by using AI
questions.notes: Highest priority comparison page. Update with 2026 data, add concrete cost comparisons.

questions.question: How does AI review a contract for hidden fees and risks?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't know what AI looks for when reviewing contracts
questions.notes: Current page is strong. Maintain and protect. Add 2026 example updates.

questions.question: What hidden fees should I look for in a construction contract?
questions.userProblem: Homeowners don't know what specific fees contractors hide in construction agreements
questions.notes: Add construction-specific fee checklist with dollar ranges.

questions.question: What hidden fees do HVAC contractors charge?
questions.userProblem: Homeowners get HVAC quotes and can't tell which charges are legitimate
questions.notes: Strong existing page. Update pricing data for 2026.

questions.question: How do I check my bills for errors and overcharges?
questions.userProblem: Consumers want a practical process for auditing their own bills
questions.notes: Strong existing page with good examples. Consider adding video walkthrough.

questions.question: Can AI review my lease agreement before I sign?
questions.userProblem: Renters want lease review but can't afford a lawyer for every lease
questions.notes: Merge ai-rental-lease-analyzer.html content. Add common lease hidden fees.

questions.question: What are the biggest red flags in contracts?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't know what 'bad' contract terms look like
questions.notes: Add visual examples of flagged contract text. Sort red flags by severity.

questions.question: How do I negotiate better contract terms?
questions.userProblem: Consumers have identified problems but don't know how to negotiate changes
questions.notes: Add negotiation scripts for specific scenarios.

questions.question: Is AI bill analysis better than checking bills myself?
questions.userProblem: Consumers wonder if AI tools are worth using vs. manual review
questions.notes: Add speed/accuracy comparison table with real data.

questions.question: How do automatic renewal clauses trap me into paying more?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't understand how auto-renewal clauses work against them
questions.notes: Add state-by-state legal variations. Include cancellation template language.

questions.question: What should I check before signing any contract?
questions.userProblem: Consumers want a comprehensive pre-signing checklist
questions.notes: Merge content from before-signing-a-contract.html. Create printable PDF version.

questions.question: How do car dealers hide fees in financing agreements?
questions.userProblem: Car buyers don't know what fees are negotiable vs. mandatory in dealer financing
questions.notes: Add 2026 dealer fee data. Include specific line-item examples from real contracts.

questions.question: How accurate is AI at finding hidden fees?
questions.userProblem: Consumers are skeptical of AI accuracy and need evidence before trusting it
questions.notes: Add testing data, accuracy rates by document type, comparison benchmarks.

questions.question: What hidden fees are in home renovation contracts?
questions.userProblem: Homeowners getting renovation quotes don't know the common fee traps
questions.notes: Add fee checklist organized by renovation type (kitchen, bathroom, addition).

questions.question: Can AI review my employment contract before I accept a job?
questions.userProblem: Job seekers want to understand employment contract terms without paying a lawyer
questions.notes: Add non-compete, IP assignment, and compensation clause examples.

questions.question: How do I dispute a hidden fee I already paid?
questions.userProblem: Consumers discovered hidden fees after paying and need remediation steps
questions.notes: Add step-by-step dispute process. Include CFPB complaint link. Add template letters by industry.

questions.question: What's the difference between an estimate and a binding quote?
questions.userProblem: Consumers don't understand their legal rights with estimates vs. quotes
questions.notes: Add state-specific legal distinctions. Include what to demand in writing.

questions.question: How do I find duplicate charges on my medical bills?
questions.userProblem: Patients receive complex medical bills with unclear duplicate line items
questions.notes: Add medical billing code examples. Include insurance EOB comparison guide.

questions.question: Is AI contract review safe? What happens to my documents?
questions.userProblem: Privacy-concerned consumers worry about uploading sensitive documents to AI
questions.notes: Add plain-language privacy explanation. Address common security questions.

questions.question: How do change orders hide extra costs in construction?
questions.userProblem: Homeowners don't understand how change orders become cost traps
questions.notes: Add real change order examples with before/after cost comparisons.

questions.question: Can AI review my freelance contract for fair payment terms?
questions.userProblem: Freelancers want contract review but can't afford legal services
questions.notes: Add freelance-specific clauses: kill fees, IP ownership, payment schedules.

questions.question: What banking fees are illegal or can be waived?
questions.userProblem: Bank customers don't know which fees they can legally challenge
questions.notes: Add regulatory context (Reg E, Reg DD). Include fee waiver request scripts.

questions.question: How do I compare quotes from different contractors?
questions.userProblem: Consumers get multiple quotes but can't compare them apples-to-apples
questions.notes: Create comparison worksheet. Add line-item comparison methodology.

questions.question: What does AI contract review cost vs. a lawyer?
questions.userProblem: Consumers want hard cost comparison numbers before choosing AI or attorney
questions.notes: Add cost comparison table: AI ($0-50) vs lawyer ($500-2000+) per contract type.

questions.question: Can AI catch pricing manipulation in service proposals?
questions.userProblem: Consumers suspect they're being overcharged but can't prove it
questions.notes: Add examples of common pricing manipulation tactics with AI detection methods.

questions.question: How does AI financial analysis work step by step?
questions.userProblem: Consumers want transparency into how AI analyzes their financial documents
questions.notes: Add illustrated process diagram. Show example document → AI analysis → results.
